properties.full_address: 777 Isle of Capri Boulevard, Pompano Beach, FL 33069

properties.description: The 223-acre development is bringing a mixed-use hospitality destination to Pompano Beach, anchored by a Live! dining and entertainment district.

properties.full_address: 100 W Atlantic Blvd, Pompano Beach, FL 33060
properties.description: Pompano Beach is revitalizing its downtown with a $2 billion 75-acre redevelopment, which will include four million square feet of residential and commercial space and a new City Hall.

properties.developers: Related Group and Merrimac Ventures in collaboration with Hilton
properties.description: The two-acre beachfront site will house 92 luxury residences, over 85 percent of which are under contract. Completion is slated for summer 2027.

properties.full_address: 1380 S. Ocean Boulevard, Pompano Beach, Florida 33062
properties.developers: Fortune International Group and Oak Capital
properties.description: The exclusively residential project features two towers with 205 luxury residences ranging from 1,100 to 6,500 square feet. Only three units are remaining for sale, a source said.

properties.full_address: 20 N. Ocean Boulevard, Pompano Beach, FL 33062

properties.description: The 24-story tower includes 77 private residences and 296 condo-hotel units. It's expected to open in 2029.

Construction of Broward County's first Generation V Porsche dealership, which spans 313,000 square feet, is ongoing.
